title: Sweet Saute Filipino Bottarga Leche Flan
description: A Filipino dessert featuring bottarga and a sugar-free friendly leche flan, perfect for a lazy Sunday, with a mustardy and shattering texture.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a medium saucepan, combine the sweetened condensed milk, melted butter, and vanilla extract, and heat over low heat, stirring occasionally.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, salt, and lemon zest.
Gradually add the warm milk mixture to the eggs, whisking constantly.
Pour the mixture into 6 small ramekins or cups.
Place the ramekins in a large baking dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides.
Bake for 45 minutes, or until the edges are set and the centers are still slightly jiggly.
Remove the ramekins from the water bath and let cool to room temperature.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or until chilled and set.
